name: Nicomedes' Anchovy
recipeInstructions:
1) Trim and peel the turnip. Slice it into thin pieces shaped like anchovy filets.
2) Place the sliced turnips in rapidly boiling water and cook for 3-5 minutes, until tender but not too soft. Drain.
3) Arrange the cooked turnip pieces on a plate. Pour olive oil over them, ensuring all surfaces are covered.
4) Season generously with salt. Sprinkle poppy seeds carefully over the turnips, covering exposed surfaces but keeping them off the "anchovies".
